WORK INSTRUCTION – RECONFIG – PRINT LABOR LOAD REPORT

# **PRINT LABOR LOAD REPORT**

In preparation for the actual Assembly process, the 'Zebra Labor Load Report' can be printed.

This report contains important information about the Assembly itself and the Components and Resources required prior to carrying out the Assembly completion process.

**Step 1:** From the Oracle Forms Toolbar select 'View' -> 'Requests'

Click on 'Submit a New Request' in the pop-up screen 'Find Requests'

**Step 2:** Select the report 'Zebra Labor Load Report'

**Step 3:** In the 'Parameters' section enter the following details:

- Organization: 'TX4'
- WIP Job Name: Scan or enter the Job Number
- Job Status: 'Released' or 'Released and Unreleased'

*Note: It is not possible to run the report for a job with status 'Complete' or 'Closed'*

Click on 'OK'

**Step 4:** Click on the button 'Submit'

In the pop-up box select 'Yes' if you want to generate another report, otherwise select 'No'

![](_page_0_Picture_17.jpeg)

Once you have selected 'No', click on 'Find' in the pop-up screen 'Find Requests'

**Step 5:** By default all your report requests from the previous 7 days will now be displayed

> To view your report, select the report record first and click on the 'View Output' button.

The report will be displayed, ready for printing

![](_page_0_Picture_22.jpeg)

![](_page_0_Figure_23.jpeg)

![](_page_0_Figure_24.jpeg)

Document: WI - ReConfig - Print Labor Load Report v1.0.docx
